title: Debugging Obsidian Templater Daily Template
first_prompt: Can you help me debug my Obsidian Templater template? The Daily Template is not running the code anymore. Not sure why. I expect it to run when I create a new Daily Note. The template is located at /U
summary: Irwin was attempting to debug his Obsidian Templater Daily Template, which was failing to execute embedded scripts designed to manage "fleeting thoughts" and "uncompleted tasks." The conversation evolved through several debugging cycles, first requiring the scripts to be updated to handle both `##` and `###` heading levels. As the user encountered various console errors related to the `tp` object and the `tp.date` API, the assistant iteratively refined the code, eventually replacing complex context calls with direct use of the global `app` object and the `moment()` function, though the session concluded with the scripts running without errors but failing to copy the intended unchecked items.
